caption: A man wearing glasses, headphones, a white dress shirt with suspenders, a bow tie, and a tall, grey, spiked wig sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone and speaks, with his facial expressions subtly shifting as he talks. Behind him is a wall covered in framed photographs and a white storage bin. On-screen text appearing on the left and right sides of the frame includes "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." The man remains stationary throughout the sequence, and the background remains unchanged, with only the slight movement of his mouth and facial muscles indicating the progression of time as he speaks.
